description_long: A muscular adult male figure is depicted wearing ornate, fantasy-inspired armor with metallic shoulder guards, bracers, and a decorated belt featuring gold and red accents. His arms and upper chest are exposed, showing a strong build, while his lower body is clad in black pants with armored greaves and decorative elements. He holds a massive, square-headed war hammer with a long handle, which appears to be made of metal and stone, suggesting a character of great strength. The armor is detailed with gold trim and red highlights, and the overall design is reminiscent of a warrior or gladiator from a fantasy setting. The figure is bald and has a stern facial expression, further emphasizing his imposing presence. The combination of heavy armor and weaponry makes him stand out as a formidable character in any urban or fantasy environment.
description: A muscular armored male warrior with ornate gold and red armor, holding a large war hammer and wearing black pants and greaves. The figure is bald and exudes strength and intimidation.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full armor detail, muscular build, and the war hammer held in front, with facial features clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, arm armor, and the length of the war hammer extending behind the figure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the armor, the bald head, and the hammer resting across the shoulders, with decorative belt details visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm armor and the hammer's handle, with the figure's stern profile.
attribute_clothing_type: fantasy warrior armor with metallic shoulder guards, bracers, decorated belt, and armored greaves over fitted pants
